exercises.name: BACK SQUAT
exercises.notes: SIT BACK AND DOWN, 15° TOE FLARE, DRIVE YOUR KNEES OUT LATERALLY

exercises.name: BARBELL BENCH PRESS
exercises.notes: TUCK ELBOWS AT A 45° ANGLE, SQUEEZE YOUR SHOULDER BLADES AND STAY FIRM ON THE BENCH

exercises.name: LAT PULLDOWN
exercises.notes: PULL YOUR ELBOWS DOWN AND IN, USE A 1.5X SHOULDER WIDTH GRIP

exercises.name: ROMANIAN DEADLIFT
exercises.notes: MAINTAIN A NEUTRAL LOWER BACK, SET YOUR HIPS BACK, DON'T ALLOW YOUR SPINE TO ROUND

exercises.name: ASSISTED DIP
exercises.notes: TUCK ELBOWS AT A 45° ANGLE, LEAN YOUR TORSO FORWARD 15°

exercises.name: STANDING CALF RAISE
exercises.notes: PRESS ALL THE WAY UP TO YOUR TOES, STRETCH YOUR CALVES AT THE BOTTOM, DON’T BOUNCE

exercises.name: DUMBBELL SUPINATED CURL
exercises.notes: DRIVE YOUR PINKY INTO THE HANDLE HARDER THAN YOUR POINTER FINGER

exercises.name: DEADLIFT
exercises.notes: BRACE YOUR LATS, CHEST TALL, HIPS HIGH, PULL THE SLACK OUT OF THE BAR PRIOR TO MOVING IT OFF THE GROUND

exercises.name: OVERHEAD PRESS
exercises.notes: SQUEEZE YOUR GLUTES TO KEEP YOUR TORSO UPRIGHT, CLEAR YOUR HEAD OUT OF THE WAY, PRESS UP AND SLIGHTLY BACK

exercises.name: CHEST-SUPPORTED T-BAR ROW
exercises.notes: FOCUS ON SQUEEZING YOUR SHOULDER BLADES TOGETHER AS YOU PULL THE WEIGHT TOWARDS YOU. KEEP YOUR SHOULDERS DOWN (AVOID SHRUGGING).

exercises.name: LEG EXTENSION
exercises.notes: FOCUS ON SQUEEZING YOUR QUADS TO MAKE THE WEIGHT MOVE

exercises.name: CABLE FLYE
exercises.notes: KEEP YOUR ELBOWS SLIGHTLY BENT AT A CONSTANT ANGLE WHILE SQUEEZING YOUR PECS TO MOVE THE WEIGHT

exercises.name: CRUNCH
exercises.notes: FOCUS ON FLEXING YOUR SPINE (ROUNDING YOUR BACK), DON’T YANK YOUR HEAD WITH YOUR ARMS

exercises.name: DUMBBELL SKULL CRUSHER
exercises.notes: KEEP YOUR ELBOWS IN LINE WITH THE TOP OF YOUR HEAD, DON'T LET YOUR UPPER ARM MOVE

exercises.name: DUMBBELL WALKING LUNGE
exercises.notes: 10 STEPS EACH LEG. TAKE MEDIUM STRIDES, LET YOUR TORSO LEAN FORWARD

exercises.name: DUMBBELL INCLINE PRESS
exercises.notes: USE ~45° INCLINE. MIND MUSCLE CONNECTION WITH UPPER PECS.

exercises.name: REVERSE GRIP LAT PULLDOWN
exercises.notes: PULL YOUR ELBOWS DOWN AGAINST YOUR SIDES, USE SHOULDER WIDTH GRIP

exercises.name: BARBELL HIP THRUST
exercises.notes: TUCK YOUR CHIN AND RIB CAGE DOWN, ONLY MOVE YOUR HIPS. USE A PAD

exercises.name: SEATED FACE PULL
exercises.notes: PULL YOUR ARMS BACK AND OUT

exercises.name: DUMBBELL LATERAL RAISE
exercises.notes: RAISE THE DUMBBELL “OUT” NOT “UP”, MIND MUSCLE CONNECTION WITH MIDDLE FIBERS

exercises.name: LYING LEG CURL
exercises.notes: FOCUS ON SQUEEZING YOUR HAMSTRINGS TO MAKE THE WEIGHT MOVE

exercises.name: BACK SQUAT
exercises.notes: SIT BACK AND DOWN, 15° TOE FLARE, DRIVE YOUR KNEES OUT LATERALLY

exercises.name: DUMBBELL SEATED SHOULDER PRESS
exercises.notes: BRING THE DUMBBELL ALL THE WAY DOWN TO YOUR SHOULDERS, KEEP YOUR TORSO UPRIGHT

exercises.name: SINGLE-ARM PULLDOWN
exercises.notes: START WITH YOUR NON-DOMINANT ARM, MATCH REPS WITH DOMINANT ARM

exercises.name: BARBELL HIP THRUST
exercises.notes: TUCK YOUR CHIN AND RIB CAGE DOWN, ONLY MOVE YOUR HIPS. USE A PAD

exercises.name: PEC DECK
exercises.notes: NICE STRETCH ON THE PECS AT THE BOTTOM AND FULL SQUEEZE AT THE TOP. CONTROL!

exercises.name: REVERSE PEC DECK
exercises.notes: SWEEP THE WEIGHT OUT AND BACK, MIND MUSCLE CONNECTION WITH REAR DELTS

exercises.name: CABLE LATERAL RAISE
exercises.notes: LEAN AWAY FROM THE MACHINE, ARMS STRAIGHT OUT TO YOUR SIDE

exercises.name: DEADLIFT
exercises.notes: BRACE YOUR LATS, CHEST TALL, HIPS HIGH, PULL THE SLACK OUT OF THE BAR PRIOR TO MOVING IT OFF THE GROUND

exercises.name: CLOSE-GRIP BENCH PRESS
exercises.notes: SHOULDER WIDTH GRIP, TUCK YOUR ELBOWS AGAINST YOUR SIDES

exercises.name: DUMBBELL ROW
exercises.notes: BRACE ONTO A BENCH FOR SUPPORT, PULL YOUR ELBOW AGAINST YOUR SIDES

exercises.name: DUMBBELL WALKING LUNGE
exercises.notes: 12 STEPS EACH LEG. TAKE MEDIUM STRIDES, LET YOUR TORSO LEAN FORWARD

exercises.name: ASSISTED DIP
exercises.notes: TUCK ELBOWS AT A 45° ANGLE, LEAN YOUR TORSO FORWARD 15°

exercises.name: BICYCLE CRUNCH
exercises.notes: FOCUS ON SQUEEZING YOUR ABS AS YOU BRING YOUR LEFT ELBOW TO RIGHT KNEE, RIGHT ELBOW TO LEFT KNEE

exercises.name: SINGLE-ARM CABLE CURL
exercises.notes: FACE AWAY FROM THE CABLE YOU ARE USING, KEEP YOUR ARM BEHIND YOUR TORSO

exercises.name: BACK SQUAT
exercises.notes: SIT BACK AND DOWN, 15° TOE FLARE, DRIVE YOUR KNEES OUT LATERALLY

exercises.name: BARBELL BENCH PRESS
exercises.notes: TUCK ELBOWS AT A 45° ANGLE, SQUEEZE YOUR SHOULDER BLADES AND STAY FIRM ON THE BENCH

exercises.name: NEUTRAL-GRIP PULLDOWN
exercises.notes: PALMS FACING EACH OTHER. PULL YOUR ELBOWS AGAINST YOUR SIDES

exercises.name: LYING LEG CURL
exercises.notes: FOCUS ON SQUEEZING YOUR HAMSTRINGS TO MAKE THE WEIGHT MOVE

exercises.name: SEATED FACE PULL
exercises.notes: PULL YOUR ARMS BACK AND OUT

exercises.name: SINGLE-ARM ROPE TRICEP EXTENSION
exercises.notes: PULL YOUR ARM BEHIND YOUR TORSO, DON'T MOVE YOUR UPPER ARM

exercises.name: STANDING CALF RAISE
exercises.notes: PRESS ALL THE WAY UP TO YOUR TOES, STRETCH YOUR CALVES AT THE BOTTOM, DON’T BOUNCE

exercises.notes: SIT BACK AND DOWN, 15° TOE FLARE, DRIVE YOUR KNEES OUT LATERALLY

exercises.notes: MAINTAIN A NEUTRAL LOWER BACK, SET YOUR HIPS BACK, DON'T ALLOW YOUR SPINE TO ROUND

exercises.notes: TUCK YOUR CHIN AND RIB CAGE DOWN, ONLY MOVE YOUR HIPS. USE A PAD

exercises.notes: FOCUS ON SQUEEZING YOUR QUADS TO MAKE THE WEIGHT MOVE

exercises.name: LYING LEG CURL
exercises.notes: FOCUS ON SQUEEZING YOUR HAMSTRINGS TO MAKE THE WEIGHT MOVE

exercises.notes: KEEP YOUR BUTT IN THE SEAT, FOCUS ON SQUEEZING YOUR GLUTES TO MAKE THE WEIGHT MOVE

exercises.name: ASSISTED DIP
exercises.notes: TUCK ELBOWS AT A 45° ANGLE, LEAN YOUR TORSO FORWARD 15°

exercises.name: BARBELL BENT OVER ROW
exercises.notes: LEAN YOUR TORSO OVER AT A 45° ANGLE, KEEP YOUR LOWER BACK NEUTRAL, DOUBLE OVERHAND GRIP

exercises.name: DUMBBELL LATERAL RAISE
exercises.notes: RAISE THE DUMBBELL “OUT” NOT “UP”, MIND MUSCLE CONNECTION WITH MIDDLE FIBERS

exercises.name: SEATED FACE PULL
exercises.notes: PULL YOUR ARMS BACK AND OUT

exercises.name: HAMMER CURL
exercises.notes: NEUTRAL GRIP, PREVENT YOUR UPPER ARM FROM MOVING
